awards.title: Men's Wildcard
awards.subtitle: Biggest swing between workouts
awards.name: Albert Rechberger
awards.detail: Range: 23 percentile points between best and worst

awards.title: Men's Metronome
awards.subtitle: Most consistent across all 3 workouts
awards.name: Daniel Käfer-Schlager
awards.detail: Volatility: 2.8 — nearly the same percentile every week

awards.title: Women's Wildcard
awards.subtitle: Biggest swing between workouts
awards.name: Ines Forstenlechner
awards.detail: Range: 36 percentile points between best and worst

awards.title: Women's Metronome
awards.subtitle: Most consistent across all 3 workouts
awards.name: Sandra Haider
awards.detail: Volatility: 1.5 — nearly the same percentile every week
